title: Intelligent Villagers
description:
Intelligent Villagers transforms Minecraft villagers into evolving societies.
They build, mine, research technology, and develop advanced villages over time.
Designed to feel alive, dynamic, and emergent.
body:
🧠Intelligent Villagers

This mod fundamentally enhances villagers and allows them to develop like a real civilization.

🔹 Features:
- Villagers evolve over time
- They organize into groups and villages
- Technological progression in phases
- Simulated work, research and building behavior
- Dynamic development based on gameplay
- Configurable development speed

🎮 Gameplay:
Villagers feel alive and react to their environment.
The mod is designed to be stable and expandable in future updates.

⚙️ Compatibility:
- Minecraft: 1.20.1
- Forge: 47.4.13
- Singleplayer & Multiplayer supported

📦 Installation:
1. Install Forge for Minecraft 1.20.1
2. Place the .jar file into the mods folder
3. Launch the game – done

⚠️ Note:
This mod is under active development. More features will be added.
